caption:
The lecture hall hummed with the usual pre-semester buzz, but all eyes were on me. 😏 I adjusted my blazer, feeling the silk of my blouse against my skin, knowing the way it hugged my curves was designed for this exact moment. I'm Dr. Elena Rossi, and tonight, the university's library isn't just for books—it's for secrets. 📚✨

I'd been planning this all semester. While my students sat in the front, my professor's blazer, tailored and fitted, hid the soft, generous swell of my breasts, while my tight skirts and high heels did the same for my curves. But as I leaned across my desk, whispering to the Dean's favorite student, the fabric stretched, and the tension between us was palpable. 💦

We moved to the dimly lit archive room, where the scent of old paper mixed with something sweeter. My blazer came open slightly, revealing just enough to hint at the fire beneath. The whispers turned into gasps, then giggles, as the usual order of the university dissolved into something wild. By the end, I was the teacher, the student, and the muse—all wrapped in the same outfit, under the same lights. 🌙🔥

#UnivLife #SecretTeacher #AcademicAffairs #ElenaRossi #CurvesAndBooks #CampusSecrets
